data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new inference-challenge system, META_QUESTION signal, decision_id format, and configuration keys introduced by this epic.

**Why**: Without concrete documentation updates, consumers of red-team-reviewer, the PRECONDITIONS system, and the brainstorm Phase 1 Gate will operate on outdated guidance, leading to incorrect usage of the new inference-challenge mode.

**Scope**:
- IN: Update plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with preconditions.inference_review.rate_rationale and rate_high_stakes keys and their floor behavior; update plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md Phase 2.5 dispatch block to specify mode parameter for dso:red-team-reviewer invocations; update CLAUDE.md to mention META_QUESTION as a distinct signal from REPLAN_ESCALATE with its escalation behavior; verify completion-verifier agent guidance accurately reflects updated PRECONDITIONS schema; update any other existing docs that reference the Phase 1 Gate, red-team-reviewer dispatch, or PRECONDITIONS decisions_log that would become stale
- OUT: Creating new documentation files or patterns; changes to brainstorm/preplanning skills beyond prose updates (code changes belong in S2, S3)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents preconditions.inference_review.rate_rationale and rate_high_stakes with their defaults, valid ranges, and floor behavior
  ← Satisfies: "one-time install-time log entry stating the active default" (SC5)
- When this story is complete, preplanning SKILL.md Phase 2.5 dispatch block specifies the mode parameter for dso:red-team-reviewer so agents don't silently apply inference-challenge mode to story-review invocations
  ← Satisfies: consumer protection (adversarial review finding)
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes META_QUESTION as distinct from REPLAN_ESCALATE
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy for META_QUESTION signal (SC1)

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: Update project docs to reflect adversarial inference-challenge system, META_QUESTION signal, and new config keys
